title: gaultheria subglobularis
intro: Gaultheria subglobularis, a species of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae), is native to the Himalayas and is also known as the Himalayan wintergreen or Himalayan Gaultheria. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and possessing antioxidant properties. Gaultheria subglobularis is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
